name: how-not-to-die-discover-the-foods-scientifically-proven-to-prevent-and-reverse-disease
description: Dr. Michael Greger's 'How Not to Die: Discover the Foods Scientifically Proven to Prevent and Reverse Disease' — the definitive guide to using nutrition to prevent and reverse the leading causes of death. 15 chapters on the top killers. The famous Daily Dozen checklist. Thousands of peer-reviewed studies cited.
